attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_RESOURCE_ASSIGNMENTS)


FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_ASSIGNMENTS STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_ASSIGNMENTS,
 (
 select RESOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_ASSIGNMENTS
 minus
 select RESOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_RESOURCE_ASSIGNMENTS
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.RESOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID = STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_ASSIGNMENTS.RESOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_RESOURCE_ASSIGNMENTS.REFRESH_DATETIME
